title: Implement terminal sink formatting
description:
Implement the terminal output formatting in RunOutput methods.

Each event method writes human-readable output to stdout/stderr:
- AgentInfo: 'Agent: %s\nWorktree: %s'
- ContextGenerating: 'Generating epic context for %s (%d tasks)...'
- ContextProgress: '\r  Context: %s elapsed, %d tokens in, %d tokens out' (carriage return overwrite)
- ContextGenerated: 'Context generated (~%d tokens)'
- TaskStarted: '\n=== Iteration %d: %s (%s) ==='
- TaskCompleted: '\n--- Iteration %d complete (tokens: %d in, %d out, cost: $%.4f) ---'
- RunComplete: '=== Run Complete ===\nEpic: ...\nIterations: ...' etc
- WrapupStepResult: '  [PASS/FAIL] %s'
- MergeResult: 'Merged to %s...' or 'Warning: merge failed...'
- Warn/Error: to stderr

When JSONL mode is enabled, suppress all human output. RunComplete emits JSON to stdout instead.

Files: internal/output/output.go (method implementations)
Tests: capture stdout/stderr via buffers, verify formatting, verify JSONL suppression.
